originalTitle: Top Goldman lawyer Ruemmler to remain with bank despite Epstein ties
summary: General counsel resigned after revelations about relationship with disgraced financier but now will stay on as adviser
content: General counsel resigned after revelations about relationship with disgraced financier but now will stay on as adviser
chineseTitle: 尽管与爱泼斯坦有联系，高盛高级律师吕姆勒仍将留在银行
chineseSummary: 总法律顾问在与名誉扫地的金融家的关系被曝光后辞职，但现在将继续担任顾问
chineseContent: 总法律顾问在与名誉扫地的金融家的关系被曝光后辞职，但现在将继续担任顾问
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
